title: CrewAI Agent
description: Can be invoked as a tool (`<nodeId>.run_agent`) by other agents.
For multi-agent delegation, use a CrewAI Manager + CrewAI Subagent nodes.

tool.description: Tools available to the agent (via control-plane invoke)

agent_description.title: Agent description
agent_description.description: What does this agent do? Describe its purpose and capabilities, this helps parent agents select and invoke it correctly.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Additional instructions to guide the agent.

advanced_mode.title: Advanced Mode
advanced_mode.description: Expose CrewAI Agent and Task configuration directly.

role.title: Role
role.description: Agent role name (e.g. 'Financial Analyst'). Maps to CrewAI Agent(role=...).

goal.title: Goal
goal.description: What this agent is trying to achieve. Maps to CrewAI Agent(goal=...).

backstory.title: Backstory
backstory.description: Background context for this agent's persona. Maps to CrewAI Agent(backstory=...).

task_description.title: Task
task_description.description: What this agent should do. If blank, the incoming question is used. Maps to CrewAI Task(description=...).

expected_output.title: Expected Output
expected_output.description: Description of the expected output format. Maps to CrewAI Task(expected_output=...).
